tables.caption: State-estimation accuracy on nominal and stress-test scenarios (common evaluation window: steps 11--119, 109 evaluated steps).
Paired statistical comparison for hybrid estimators on trajectory-wise position RMSE (one-sided Wilcoxon, alternative: candidate better).
Matched-budget comparison across prior-guided learned variants in the main benchmark.

figures.caption: Per-step position RMSE over the nominal and stress-test evaluation windows. The x-axis corresponds to the evaluated steps after the 12-step model window is available. The figure is used as a temporal diagnostic; it does not override the aggregate and statistical conclusions in Tables~\ref{tab:main_results

Per-step position RMSE over the nominal and stress-test evaluation windows. The x-axis corresponds to the evaluated steps after the 12-step model window is available. The figure is used as a temporal diagnostic; it does not override the aggregate and statistical conclusions in Tables~\ref{tab:main_results

Position RMSE stratified by visibility bucket for the nominal and stress-test settings. Buckets are evaluated trajectory-steps with 0, 1, or $\geq2$ visible stations. The plot is main-manuscript evidence for visibility-bucket diagnostics in the evaluated runs only.

Uncertainty calibration diagnostic for the evaluated runs. The plot compares nominal and empirical central coverage for learned position uncertainty and is interpreted as diagnostic evidence rather than a deployment guarantee.
